name: arctis-sound-manager
description: Tauri CLI entrypoint for the GUI. Run `pnpm tauri dev` / `pnpm tauri build` from the REPO ROOT — tauri.conf.json lives in src-tauri/, so the CLI must run where src-tauri/ is a subfolder. The Svelte frontend is a separate package in frontend/ (install its deps with `cd frontend && pnpm install`).
